creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
I've tried updating the port to the latest version as per the MariaDB documented version 25.3.15

Can you try the updated port from my github? https://github.com/Sp1l/ports/tree/master/databases/galera

That tarball from galeracluster.com doesn't bundle the documentation so I had to remove all of that. Not sure about the force config...

I don't have a cluster here to test, would appreciate if you can let me know if this works!

Horia: Haven't cleaned up... Probably a lot of now defunct REINPLACE_CMD in the post_patch target...
